# Architecture Overview

## Project Structure

### Frontend (React)
```
src/
├── components/          # React components
│   ├── About.js        # About section
│   ├── BookUs.js       # Booking/contact form component
│   ├── Carousel.js     # Image carousel
│   ├── Contact.js      # Contact information display
│   ├── FindUs.js       # Location/map section
│   ├── Footer.js       # Footer component
│   ├── Menu.js         # Menu display component
│   ├── LandingPage.js  # Main landing page
│   ├── MainNavbar.js   # Navigation bar
│   ├── PromoBanner.js  # Promotional banner
│   ├── Privacy.js      # Privacy policy page
│   └── IframeEmbed.js  # Iframe utilities
├── assets/              # Static assets
│   ├── css/            # Custom stylesheets
│   └── img/            # Images
├── data/
│   └── menu.json       # Menu data
├── App.js              # Main App component
└── index.js            # Entry point
```

### Backend (Express.js)
- **server.js**: Express server handling form submissions and API requests
- Integrates with Nodemailer for email notifications
- Google reCAPTCHA validation for form submissions

### Netlify Functions
```
netlify/functions/
├── autocomplete.js     # Autocomplete API endpoint
└── submit-form.js      # Form submission handler
```

### Build Output
- **build/**: Production-ready files generated by `npm run build`
- **public/**: Static public assets

## Technology Stack

### Frontend
- **React 18.3.1**: UI framework
- **React Router DOM 6.23.0**: Client-side routing
- **React Bootstrap 2.10.2**: Bootstrap components for React
- **Bootstrap 5.3.3**: CSS framework
- **Axios 1.7.2**: HTTP client
- **React Google reCAPTCHA 3.1.0**: Spam protection
- **React Places Autocomplete 7.3.0**: Location autocomplete
- **Contentful 10.11.2**: Headless CMS integration

### Backend
- **Express.js 4.19.2**: Web server framework
- **Nodemailer 6.9.13**: Email service
- **CORS 2.8.5**: Cross-origin resource sharing
- **Dotenv 16.4.5**: Environment variable management

### Animation & Effects
- **Animate.css 4.1.1**: CSS animations
- **WOW.js 1.2.2**: Scroll animations
- **Waypoints 4.0.1**: Scroll event triggers
- **CounterUp2 2.0.2**: Number counter animations
- **React Owl Carousel 2.3.3**: Carousel component

### Utilities
- **React Helmet 6.1.0**: Document head management
- **Moment.js 2.30.1**: Date/time manipulation
- **Tempusdominus Bootstrap**: DateTime picker

## Data Flow

1. **Frontend**: React components fetch/display data
2. **Form Submission**: 
   - User submits form on BookUs.js
   - Request sent to backend with reCAPTCHA token
   - Express server validates reCAPTCHA
   - Nodemailer sends confirmation email
   - Response returned to frontend
3. **Menu Data**: Loaded from `menu.json` or Contentful CMS

## Deployment

- **Platform**: Netlify
- **Build Command**: `npm run build`
- **Server**: Hosted at https://kuyakevinsbbq.com

## Environment Variables

Required environment variables (set in `.env` or Netlify settings):
- `REACT_APP_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY`: Google reCAPTCHA site key
- `REACT_APP_API_URL`: Backend API endpoint
- `SMTP_*`: Email service credentials
- `CONTENTFUL_*`: Contentful CMS credentials (if used)
